POSSyncState.title: POS Sync State
POSSyncState.description: Consolidated state of the Point of Sale system synchronized across all authorized devices in real time.

users.description: List of employees and administrative auth credentials.

tables.description: Tables and seating areas layout with corresponding occupied statuses.

orders.description: Past and active dine-in, takeaway, and delivery orders.

notifications.description: Workspace alerts and printer chime triggers.

settings.description: General settings of the POS venue.

updatedAt.description: Server timestamp of the last write update.

/pos_states/{stateId}.description: Stores real-time synchronized datasets keyed by state configuration context.
